'''鈭歴-s-ng-n''' ('''kasasngenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ake|ake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ake|ake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-s-ng-n
|-
! Lemma
| kasasngenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisasngenoko|thisasngenoko]] || [[word:jisasngenoko|jisasngenoko]] || [[word:shisasngenoko|shisasngenoko]] || [[word:kisasngenoko|kisasngenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusasngenoko|thuthusasngenoko]] || [[word:jujusasngenoko|jujusasngenoko]] || [[word:shushusasngenoko|shushusasngenoko]] || [[word:kukusasngenoko|kukusasngenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasasngenoko|thasasngenoko]] || [[word:jasasngenoko|jasasngenoko]] || [[word:shasasngenoko|shasasngenoko]] || [[word:kasasngenoko|kasasngenoko]]
|-

|}
